svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="System Architecture (multiplatform)" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-764" dy="-204" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1480" pageHeight="680" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Gw" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#888888;swimlaneFillColor=#eefbe9;" value="apps/web — Next.js 15 + shadcn" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="380" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web_app" parent="Gw" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Next.js Web App
RSC + server actions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="340" x="20" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web_session" parent="Gw" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Cookie session
@supabase/ssr" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="20" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web_notify" parent="Gw" style="rounded=1;dashed=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Web Notifications
(tab open only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="160" x="200" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Gm" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#888888;swimlaneFillColor=#eef6ff;" value="apps/mobile — Expo / React Native" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="380" x="450" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mobile_app" parent="Gm" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Expo App
RN + NativeWind" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="340" x="20" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mobile_session" parent="Gm" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Secure store
expo-secure-store" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="20" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mobile_notify" parent="Gm" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Local Notifications
expo-notifications" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="160" x="200" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Gd" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#888888;swimlaneFillColor=#fbf3ff;" value="apps/desktop — Tauri (wraps web build)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="380" x="860" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="desktop_shell" parent="Gd" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Tauri Shell
reuses apps/web UI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="340" x="20" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="desktop_session" parent="Gd" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Secure store
(Tauri keyring)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="165" x="20" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="desktop_notify" parent="Gd" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Tray Notifications
(background)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="160" x="200" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Gs" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#888888;swimlaneFillColor=#fff9e6;" value="packages/shared — @hydrate/shared (written once, consumed by all three)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="1200" x="40" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="shared_client" parent="Gs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Supabase Client
(storage adapter injected)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="250" x="30" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="shared_schemas" parent="Gs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Types + Zod
Schemas" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="310" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="shared_domain" parent="Gs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Domain Logic
goal / streak / ml" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="230" x="540" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="shared_scheduler" parent="Gs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Reminder Scheduler
tz / DST / window / quiet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="360" x="800" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Gb" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#888888;swimlaneFillColor=#f3eefb;" value="Supabase (hosted, via plugin) — Postgres + Auth + RLS only (no cron / Edge Function / push)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="800" x="40" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sb_auth" parent="Gb" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Supabase Auth
(GoTrue, JWT)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="30" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sb_db" parent="Gb" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Postgres + RLS
profiles · intake_entries · reminder_settings" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="400" x="370" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="google_oauth" parent="1" style="rounded=1;dashed=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Google OAuth
(optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="900" y="488" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arch_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;spacing=8;fontSize=12;" value="v1 has NO server push: no pg_cron, no Edge Function, no web-push, no device tokens.
Each client reads reminder_settings, computes its schedule via packages/shared, and arms its OWN local OS notifications." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="540" x="900" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae1" edge="1" parent="1" source="web_app" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;" target="shared_client" value="uses"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae2" edge="1" parent="1" source="mobile_app" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.4;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="shared_client" value="uses"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae3" edge="1" parent="1" source="desktop_shell" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.8;entryY=0;" target="shared_client" value="uses"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae4" edge="1" parent="1" source="web_app" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="web_notify" value="schedule"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae5" edge="1" parent="1" source="mobile_app" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.7;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="mobile_notify" value="schedule"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae6" edge="1" parent="1" source="desktop_shell" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.7;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="desktop_notify" value="schedule"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae7" edge="1" parent="1" source="shared_client" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="sb_auth" value="sign in / refresh"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae8" edge="1" parent="1" source="shared_client" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.6;exitY=1;entryX=0.3;entryY=0;" target="sb_db" value="CRUD (RLS)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae9" edge="1" parent="1" source="sb_auth" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="google_oauth" value="OAuth"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
v1 has NO server push: no pg_cron, no Edge Function, no web-push, no device tokens.
Each client reads reminder_settings, computes its schedule via packages/shared, and arms its OWN local OS notifications.
